title: Restore original Mexican food images from version 9 to selected elements

requirements.text: Replace the image displayed in the first menu item card (article 1, XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[2]/article[1]/div[1]/div[1]) with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9. The current image shows Chinese food and must be replaced with the authentic Mexican food image that was present on the live website at version 9.

quotes: I need the original Mexican food that are on the live website version nine

acceptanceCriteria: The first menu item card displays a Mexican food image, not a Chinese food image
The image matches what was shown in the live version 9 of the website
The image renders correctly and is not broken

requirements.text: Replace the image in the catering section (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[3]/div[2]/div[2]/img[1]) with the correct original Mexican food/catering image from version 9. The current image is incorrect and must be replaced with the authentic catering image that appeared on the live version 9 website.

acceptanceCriteria: The catering section image displays the correct Mexican food/catering image from version 9
The image is not showing Chinese food content
The image renders correctly and is not broken

constraints: Only modify the five selected elements identified by the provided XPath expressions
Do not alter any other images, layout, text, or components not referenced in the selected elements
Images must come from the existing version 9 assets already in the project (frontend/public/assets/generated) — do not create new placeholder images
nonGoals: Changing any text, descriptions, or non-image content
Modifying menu item cards not listed in the selected elements
Redesigning any section layout or styling

required: Authentic Mexican street tacos on a rustic wooden board with cilantro, lime wedges, and salsa (taco-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
Loaded Mexican burrito cut in half showing rice, beans, and seasoned meat filling (burrito-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
Golden crispy quesadilla sliced into wedges with sour cream and guacamole dipping sauces (quesadilla-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
Tortilla chips in a basket with fresh chunky salsa roja in a small bowl (chips-salsa-menu-item.dim_600x400.png)
Mexican catering spread with trays of tacos, rice, beans, and colorful garnishes at an outdoor event (catering-banner.dim_1200x600.png)
